Deltarune Any% True Reset speed run in 34:08.97 (34 minutes and 8.97 seconds).
PLEASE NOTE: I'm not sure how I am supposed to round seconds. I rounded down in my submission but whoever reviews this can change it to 9 seconds if they want.
This run is a massive improvement upon my previous runs. I still missed the 4th Rudinn, the Head Hathy skip, and I performed kind of slow in the checkerboard area. Still, overall a really good run.
